scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=client
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=client && npm run lint --workspace=server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=client && npm run typecheck --workspace=server
scripts.db:backup: mkdir -p backups && docker exec monrad-pg pg_dump -U postgres -d monrad_estimator --format=custom -f /tmp/monrad-backup.dump && docker cp monrad-pg:/tmp/monrad-backup.dump "backups/backup-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).dump" && echo 'Backup saved to backups/'
